body_txt: This is a fight that is made interesting by a special location and/or unusual circumstances. Both parties try to use these to their advantage and it looks cool too, so it's a visual and tactical plus for the Spectacle . The opponent's unusual strengths, weaknesses, or abilities can also make a fight special. May involve Dangerous Terrain . May involve odd or Improvised Weapons on one or both sides. Sub-tropes of the interesting situation duel include:
